items.title: Influex requesting AEO/SEO coordination meeting with UPQODE
items.summary: Angela from Influex wants to schedule a call with UPQODE to coordinate AEO and SEO work, ensure schema and structured data don't conflict. Proposed times: Tuesday 8-9am CST or Wednesday 24th 10:30am CST.
items.actionNeeded: Confirm if Will should attend this vendor coordination meeting or delegate to someone else.

items.title: UPQODE awaiting approval to prepare formal SEO agreement
items.summary: Val clarified Google Ads strategy (immediate visibility while organic builds). Will asked follow-up question. UPQODE is ready to move forward with formal agreement once approved.
items.actionNeeded: Review Will's question about Google Ads and approve UPQODE to prepare formal agreement.

items.title: Greenwich pharmacy report for week 06/12-06/18
items.summary: Angelica sent the weekly GRX report for Infusive covering June 12-18, 2026. Payment receipt to follow.
items.actionNeeded: Review attached Greenwich report if needed for oversight.
